creator: sakaue.mamoru@samurai.mwghennn.net
text:
This is a proposal of creating an independent port for the minimum installation of KDE3 ksysguardd.
It will sound somewhat strange because the corresponding one already exists for KDE4, but there may still be demands of enabling easy supports for stubborn clients who stick to KDE3.

There is a discussion that KDE4 ksysguardd is not compatible with KDE3 clients (although I don't know the conclusion).
http://comments.gmane.org/gmane.linux.suse.opensuse.devel/41874

I consider that this port will contribute to soft landing toward finishing the KDE3 support by the Ports Collection.
Therefore this Makefile is intentionally independent of bsd.kde.mk that intends to install many ports irrelative to ksysguardd.

Fix: Apply the following shell archive:

sysutils_ksysguardd3.shar
